prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第50名→2026年第43名，近年排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力和认可度增强；2026年声誉文件未收录该校负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第27位（较热），2023年曾位列第6位（高热），主要传播内容为水声工程、核学院、国防七子等特色方向，短视频平台关注度较高，对报考热度有正向拉动。历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信号；第五轮学科评估中控制科学与工程获评A级，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；学校以船舶与海洋工程、水声工程、核工程等'三海一核'领域为特色，相关专业在行业内认可度高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 15,582, 15,251, 12,411, 11,058, and 13,848 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a clear upward trend (rising from 15,582 to 11,058), but in 2025, it significantly dropped to 13,848, moving back by about 2,790 places in the last year, indicating large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 13,848; the university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Hubei Province has been continuously shrinking: 188 students in 2021, 176 in 2022, 171 in 2023, 150 in 2024, and 127 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 109 students, a reduction of 18 students (-14.2%) compared to 2025, with a clear trend of continuous enrollment reduction, further intensifying competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science University Ranking has been continuously rising, from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, reflecting the enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; the 2026 reputation file does not include negative public opinion about this university; Douyin popularity ranks 27th overall (relatively hot), and in 2023 it ranked 6th (very hot), with main content focusing on underwater acoustic engineering, nuclear college, and the Seven Sons of National Defense, indicating high attention on short video platforms, which positively drives application popularity. No signs of a cutoff anomaly were found in historical admission records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A- or above discipline at this university; the university is characterized by the 'Three Seas and One Nuclear' fields, including ship and ocean engineering, underwater acoustic engineering, and nuclear engineering, with related majors highly recognized in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are consistently highly recommended in society, closely matching the university's enrollment majors like Automation and Electronic Information, with popular majors driving overall application popularity upward. The number of Physics Category examinees in Hubei Province has continuously increased from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, with an estimated 239,000 in 2026, maintaining a high candidate base and generally tightening the competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the fluctuation inertia of the significant ranking drop in 2025, the continued reduction of enrollment plans by 14.2% in 2026 (reducing enrollment pushes rankings forward), the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking and high Douyin popularity (pushing rankings forward), and the high number of Physics Category examinees in Hubei Province (pushing rankings backward), the effects of enrollment reduction and intensified competition offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 12,750, ranging from 12,250 to 13,250.

The university is characterized by 'Three Seas and One Nuclear', with related majors highly recognized in the industry and clear employment directions.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 4258, 4471, 4652, and 4675, showing a slight year-by-year downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 417 positions over the past 4 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4675. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province has significantly expanded: 8 students in 2022, 13 in 2023, 28 in 2024, 38 in 2025, and 64 planned for 2026, an increase of 26 students (+68.4%) compared to 2025. This continuous substantial expansion has notably eased competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising, reaching 43rd in 2026, with a steadily strengthening overall strength. The 2026 reputation file does not include any negative public opinion about the university. Its overall Douyin popularity ranks 27th (relatively hot), but the content mainly focuses on engineering characteristics, with limited direct impact on History Category applications. No record of enrollment gaps has been observed. The university is known for its engineering strengths, and the History Category majors (Law, Business Administration, English, Sociology, etc.) are not its advantageous fields, with no corresponding A-class disciplines in discipline evaluations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has social popularity but with divided opinions, Business Administration is clearly discouraged, English is generally neutral, and overall liberal arts major popularity is moderately low. The number of History Category examinees in Hubei Province: 130,000 in 2022, 132,000 in 2023, 124,000 in 2024, 141,000 in 2025, and an estimated 155,000 in 2026, showing a slight increase in examinee numbers.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight year-by-year downward trend in History Category rankings, the significant 68.4% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (expansion pushing rankings downward), the limited appeal of the university's engineering-focused characteristics for liberal arts applications, and the slight increase in History Category examinee numbers (also pushing rankings downward), the expansion effect is dominant. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly decline compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 6644, and a range of 6144–7144.
